prompt: Run /qovery-ui craft to design a compact Service Health Summary dashboard card (count + status breakdown + last incident timestamp).

assertions.text: Recommends <StatusChip> (or shared status component) for the running/degraded/stopped states
Recommends semantic color tokens (positive/warning/negative or text-positive etc.) rather than raw Tailwind palette
Suggests Roboto Mono / tabular-nums / font-mono for the numeric counts
Treats the surface as compact (text-sm / text-xs), not a hero unit (no text-2xl/3xl/4xl)
Output includes the five sections the skill specifies: layout skeleton, component choices, typography, color, copy
Output does not include code blocks (the skill explicitly says no code)
